top_signals.title: BHP strike threat lifts iron ore price for best week since May
top_signals.summary: Supply risks in Australia offset weak Chinese steel demand, lifting iron ore toward its strongest weekly performance in two months.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: ‘Communication challenge, nothing more’: Standard Chartered keeps $100,000 bitcoin target, calls Strategy selloff a signaling problem
top_signals.summary: Standard Chartered retained its $100,000 end-2026 bitcoin target, calling Strategy's STRC pivot a signaling problem, not a solvency one.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: SK Hynix’s $26.5 billion US listing brought to Telegram users via xStocks
top_signals.summary: Solana said that tokenized SK Hynix shares on SOL can be acquired through Backpack, xStocks and Ondo Finance.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
